title: rubus hirtus var. tenuidentatus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. tenuidentatus is a lesser-known variety of the Himalayan raspberry plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family and native to the Himalayas. It is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Rubus hirtus var. tenuidentatus can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
